name: Roasted Boneless Pork Loin
recipeIngredient: 1 pork loin, trimmed of excess fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Place the pork loin on a low rack in a shallow roasting pan (no lid). The purpose of the rack is to keep the roast up out of the grease that cooks out of the roast.
3. Rub the pork loin all over with salt, pepper, and ground sage (this is a basic pork seasoning).
4. Roast for 35-40 minutes per pound until done (this is correct for a rolled roast; bone-in roasts do not require as much time). Use a meat thermometer to ensure it's cooked but not overdone.
5. No need to add water or cover the roast; this will make it tough.
